name: mobius-desktop
description: Mobius Desktop — thin Electron shell (Fork B) with bundled aimux reverse-connect.

scripts.dist:win-x64: npm run fetch-python:win-x64 && npm run prep-python:win-x64 && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:win-arm64: npm run fetch-python:win-arm64 && npm run prep-python:win-arm64 && npm run build && electron-builder --win --arm64
scripts.dist:mac-arm64: npm run fetch-python:mac-arm64 && npm run prep-python:mac-arm64 && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:mac-x64: npm run fetch-python:mac-x64 && npm run prep-python:mac-x64 && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64
